strap: Derry Manufacturing draws £433m of UKRI lead-led funding across 352 grants, anchored by Queen'S University Belfast (21%), with Seagate Technology (Ireland) and Seagate Technology Ireland on the industrial side. 7 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £62m UKRI per spin-out.
